$comment-csp: CSP script-src hashes allow inline scripts injected at build time.
These MUST be regenerated when vite-plugin-pwa or @vercel/analytics are upgraded.
To regenerate: deploy, check browser console for CSP violations, hash the blocked script:
echo -n '<script content>' | openssl dgst -sha256 -binary | openssl base64

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'sha256-ieoeWczDHkReVBsRBqaal5AFMlBtNjMzgwKvLqi/tSU=' 'sha256-ZswfTY7H35rbv8WC7NXBoiC7WNu86vSzCDChNWwZZDM=' https://va.vercel-scripts.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://api.schwabapi.com https://va.vercel-scripts.com; worker-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; frame-ancestors 'none'; manifest-src 'self'
